evidences.title: ChatGPT Tops Apple's 2025 Most Downloaded Free iPhone Apps List
evidences.content: Leading the pack is OpenAI's ChatGPT, marking its first time at No. 1 after climbing from fourth place in 2024 (when Chinese shopping app Temu held the top spot) and not even cracking the top 10 in 2023. The full top 10 free iPhone apps (non-games) for 2025 are: 1. ChatGPT (OpenAI); 2. Threads (Meta); 3. Google (Google) 4. TikTok (ByteDance); 5. WhatsApp (Meta); 6. Instagram (Meta); 7. YouTube (Google); 8. Google Maps (Google); 9. Gmail (Google); 10. Google Gemini (Google). This list underscores a banner year for Google, whose apps occupy exactly half the spots — a clear sign of the company's enduring grip on mobile essentials like search, video, navigation, email, and now AI. [...] Meta also performed strongly, securing three spots with Threads (a surprising No. 2, reflecting sustained interest in the X/Twitter alternative), WhatsApp, and Instagram. TikTok held steady at No. 4, demonstrating resilience amid ongoing regulatory scrutiny in the U.S. These rankings, published in mid-December 2025, reflect actual download data from the U.S. App Store over the full year. They differ from Apple's separate App Store Awards, which honor editorial picks for innovation rather than pure po...

evidences.title: ChatGPT Tops Apple's 2025 US Free iPhone Apps Ranking
evidences.content: According to Techcrunch Apple has published its annual ranking of the most popular apps and games for 2025, focusing on the American market. In the United States, OpenAI’s ChatGPT topped the list of free iPhone apps by downloads in 2025. The top also included Threads, Google, TikTok, WhatsApp, Instagram, YouTube, Google Maps, Gmail, and Gemini from Google, signaling AI’s deep integration into everyday mobile-device use and a changing mobile landscape. In previous years, the situation looked different: last year Temu topped the list, while ChatGPT was in fourth place. In 2023, the app itself did not make the top ten, although it appeared on iPhone in May 2023. Such changes highlight the rapid growth of AI’s popularity in the mobile space. More people now open a chatbot before they even think about a search engine. It’s also a strong signal for the future of mobile search. evidences.content: Resolver ChatGPT's dominance as the top free app in the US Apple App Store reflects robust trader consensus on its sticky user adoption, fueled by OpenAI's recent rollout of ChatGPT Search—a GPT-4o-powered feature blending large language model capabilities with real-time web browsing—and Advanced Voice Mode upgrades, which have spiked daily active users. Competitive dynamics from rising AI challengers like Google Gemini and Anthropic's Claude apps have failed to displace it amid iOS 18.1's Apple Intelligence integrations that spotlight ChatGPT. Seasonal volatility looms with holiday promotions potentially boosting social apps like Instagram or TikTok, while OpenAI's next model announcements could entrench its lead; monitor daily App Store rankings for resolution shifts. evidences.title: ChatGPT tops Apple's iPhone app downloads for 2025 - UPI.com
evidences.content: Threads, Google, TikTok and WhatsApp rounded out the five top free app downloads, while the top paid apps were HotSchedules, Shadowrocket and Procreate Pocket, Mac Rumors reported. The most popular free iPhone games downloaded this year are Block Blast, Fortnite and Roblox, and the top paid iPhone games are Minecraft, Balatro and Heads Up. News of ChatGPT dominating free-app downloads for the iPhone comes after Apple's Senior Vice President for Machine Learning and AI Strategy John Giannandrea announced his pending retirement in April. Giannandrea served in that role since 2018 and will help advise his incoming replacement until April. Apple also announced hiring AI researcher Amar Subramanya as its vice president of AI. [...] Its meteoric rise over the past two years affirms the importance that iPhone owners place on AI, which enabled the free ChatGPT app to finish ahead of popular social media apps and often-used utilities, such as Google Maps, according to TechCrunch. AI apps have demonstrated their versatility, which Bitcoin World said is changing how people use their mobile devices. ChatGPT and other popular AI apps are saving people time, personalizing their search experie...

evidences.title: ChatGPT is Apple's most downloaded app of 2025 in the US
evidences.content: # ChatGPT is Apple’s most downloaded app of 2025 in the US Apple on Wednesday released its annual list of the most downloaded apps and games for the year. For the U.S. market, OpenAI’s ChatGPT topped the ranks of free iPhone apps (not including games) with the most installs in 2025. The AI app was followed by Threads, Google, TikTok, WhatsApp, Instagram, YouTube, Google Maps, Gmail, and Google’s Gemini. ChatGPT made it to No. 4 last year, but the top spot was taken by Chinese shopping app Temu. In 2023, the AI app didn’t make the top-10 list despite being released on the iPhone in May 2023 to a strong debut. [...] Block Blast! was the top free game this year, while Minecraft took the crown as the top paid game. On iPad, YouTube was the No. 1 free app, and users downloaded the creativity app Procreate as the top paid game on iPad. Roblox was the top free iPad game. ### Disrupt 2026: The tech ecosystem, all in one room #### Your next round. Your next hire. Your next breakout opportunity. evidences.title: ChatGPT is 2025's most downloaded app in the U.S.
evidences.content: Apple released its annual list of the most downloaded apps and games for the year on December 10th. The list includes free and premium titles, as well as those included with an Apple Arcade subscription. ChatGPT ranked fourth in 2024 while shopping app Temu held the top spot. The chatbot failed to crack the top ten in 2023, which is the year it launched. Block Blast! was the most downloaded free game on iPhone while Minecraft took the top spot as the most purchased game. YouTube was the number one free app on iPad while creativity app Procreate was the leading paid app. Roblox was the most downloaded free game for iPad. evidences.title: ‎iPhone 인기 게임 및 앱
evidences.content: ### 플랫폼 # 인기 차트 ### ChatGPT OpenAI의 공식 앱 ### Capital One Travel 여행 ### Claude by Anthropic 여러분과 함께 사고하는 인공지능 비서 ### Google Gemini Google에서 제공하는 AI 어시스턴트 ### MyTSA 여행 ### Freecash - 돈버는앱 설문조사 참여하고 돈 벌기 ### Threads 대화에 참여하세요 ### Google AI, 이미지, 텍스트로 검색하세요 ### MLB 스포츠 ### CapCut: 사진 및 동영상 에디터 음악, 필터, 스티커, 이모지, 회전, 자르기 ### Temu: 억만장자처럼 쇼핑하기 역대급 할인 혜택을 Temu에서 만나보세요! ### WhatsApp Messenger 간편한 사용. 믿을 만한 서비스. 안전한 개인 정보. ### Whatnot: Shop, Sell, Connect 쇼핑 ### SHEIN - 온라인 쇼핑 모두를 위한 패션 ### Google Maps 장소, 내비게이션, 교통정보 ### The Cheesecake Factory 음식 및 음료 ### Gmail: Google이 제공하는 이메일 안전하고 빠르며 잘 정리된 이메일 ### Netflix 지금 바로 시청하세요 ### Shop: All your favorite brands 쇼핑 ### Indeed 취업 검색 인디드는 여러분의 취업을 도와드립니다 ### Grok AI X에서 실시간 정보와 함께 ### T-Life 라이프스타일 [...] ### Grok AI X에서 실시간 정보와 함께 ### T-Life 라이프스타일 ### Microsoft Teams 호출. 채팅. 공동 작업 ### TikTok - Videos, Shop & LIVE 엔터테인먼트 ### Google Chrome 구글과 함께, 빠르고 안전하게 ## 아프리카, 중동 및 인도 ## 아시아 태평양 ## 유럽 ## 라틴 아메리카 및 카리브해 ## 미국 및 캐나다 Copyright © 2026 Apple Inc. 모든 권리 보유.
